<!-- begin:install -->
### Install {{TAG}}

```sh
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/{{REPO}}/master/install.sh | sh -s {{TAG}}
```

Windows: download `git-anchor-windows-x64.exe` from the assets below and add it to your `PATH`.

See the [README](https://github.com/{{REPO}}#installation) for further instructions.
<!-- end:install -->
